testDecision.reason: Live regression is an evidence-gathering research task. Repository validators and follow-up changes provide verification evidence.

plan.summary: Run fresh-session live regression and e2e evaluation for the OpenSpec Autopilot MVP, then track all confirmed findings as OpenSpec changes.
slices: Tool API and ledger discovery checks
plan.scope: Autopilot MVP behavior, OpenSpec regression artifacts, and follow-up change tracking only.
plan.testStrategy: Use repository validation, Autopilot ledger validation, fresh-session tool output, and scenario evidence. No product code changes are required for the regression task itself.
plan.noImplementationReason: The primary deliverable is regression evidence and tracked follow-up changes, not runtime implementation.

skipped.reason: The regression change is ready enough to execute; readiness gaps discovered during live testing become findings.
Coverage is represented by scenario checklist and validation commands; run this reviewer after material findings or code changes.
Run after any instruction/routing changes created from regression findings.

mr.noMrAcceptancePolicy: This local regression task may complete with evidence and follow-up changes without MR merge.
